author_decision: Use the exact non-adjudication status; report committed evidence descriptively without a post-result regional grouping or categorical hypothesis label.

compatibility.required_status_value: not formally adjudicable under the frozen plan

hypotheses.exact_original_wording: In eastern NOAA climate regions, later-period temperature conditions may tend to increase expected MDA8 ozone, while the temperature-standardized ozone response at comparable temperatures will be lower.
hypotheses.final_status: not formally adjudicable under the frozen plan
hypotheses.status_reason: The author selected the non-adjudication option because the frozen plan contains no operational categorical decision rule.

hypotheses.exact_original_wording: In much of the eastern United States, the negative temperature-standardized response component is expected to outweigh any positive temperature-distribution component, producing lower expected MDA8 ozone overall.
hypotheses.final_status: not formally adjudicable under the frozen plan
hypotheses.status_reason: The author selected the non-adjudication option because the frozen plan contains no operational categorical decision rule.

hypotheses.exact_original_wording: Western regions are expected to show weaker, more heterogeneous, or potentially opposing response changes because background ozone, wildfire smoke, transport, terrain, and regional emissions sources may play larger roles.
hypotheses.final_status: not formally adjudicable under the frozen plan
hypotheses.status_reason: The author selected the non-adjudication option because the frozen plan contains no operational categorical decision rule.

only_frozen_reporting_instruction: These hypotheses are directional and associational. Null and contradictory findings must be reported.
